I found your dentist appointment: "Dentist Appointment" on 2024-05-18 09:00–10:00 at Downtown Dental Clinic (event ID 5). Do you want me to reschedule that event?

If yes, please tell me:

If you prefer, I can propose a few available times on your calendar — tell me how many options and what days/times work for you.
